title: Boundary action
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2.  BOUNDARY ACTION

Art. 3691.  Boundary action

An action to fix the boundary is an ordinary proceeding.

Amended by Acts 1977, No. 169, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1978.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 2.  BOUNDARY ACTION
Art. 3691.  Boundary action
An action to fix the boundary is an ordinary proceeding.
Amended by Acts 1977, No. 169, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1978.
